meaning: n.烤面包(片),吐司面包,干杯vt.敬酒,烤(面包等),使暖和vi.烤暖,烤火,烘
examples: Bugger it! I've burnt the toast.
He was choking on a piece of toast.
You'll be as warm as toast in here.
Instead, he gets a tiny dividend every time city folk spread peanut butter on their toast.
If Cao is correct and is able to execute his idea, Internet addresses could be toast by 2010.
